summary: Frontend-only animation testing for Influencer Connect. All 14 animation/interaction features verified via DOM inspection, code review, and Playwright. One critical bug found: duplicate layoutId in Layout.jsx. All 9 authenticated pages load correctly. Core animations (count-up, health bar, page transitions, kanban hover, inbox AnimatePresence, smooth scroll, btn-primary scale) are properly implemented.

ui_bugs.issue: Duplicate layoutId='nav-active': motion.div with layoutId='nav-active' is rendered TWICE for each active nav item (Layout.jsx lines 71-82 are identical). Framer Motion will throw warnings about duplicate layoutIds in the same render tree and the animation may flicker or behave unexpectedly. Fix: remove the duplicate block at lines 77-83.

action_items: CRITICAL: Fix duplicate layoutId='nav-active' in Layout.jsx - remove lines 77-83 (the second identical motion.div block). Only one motion.div with layoutId should render per active item.
critical_code_review_comments: Layout.jsx lines 71-82: motion.div with layoutId='nav-active' is copy-pasted twice inside the same conditional. This creates 2 elements with the same layoutId in the DOM simultaneously, causing Framer Motion warnings and potentially incorrect spring animation behavior. Only ONE motion.div with layoutId='nav-active' is needed.
CampaignPipeline.jsx: Loader2 spinner visible only during API call. In the test environment, the API responds too fast (<50ms) to observe spinner - this is expected and the implementation is correct.
Inbox.jsx: AnimatePresence with initial={false} wraps individual messages - correctly prevents entrance animation on initial load but animates new messages in. Working correctly.

animation_verification.page_transitions: PASS - AnimatePresence mode='wait' with pageVariants (opacity+y) in App.js
animation_verification.dashboard_countup: PASS - useCountUp hook with requestAnimationFrame (lines 37-55 Dashboard.jsx), values visible on load
animation_verification.health_bar_animation: PASS - Confirmed via DOM: 'width: 63%; transition: width 1.2s cubic-bezier(0.25, 0.46, 0.45, 0.94)'
animation_verification.stat_card_hover: PASS - whileHover={scale:1.02} with spring stiffness:400/damping:25 in StatCard
animation_verification.campaign_move_button_spinner: PASS (code verified) - Loader2 animate-spin shown while movingId===campaign.id. Spinner not capturable in test due to fast API response
animation_verification.kanban_card_hover: PASS - whileHover={y:-2, boxShadow} with spring animation in CampaignCard motion.div
animation_verification.inbox_message_animation: PASS - AnimatePresence wrapping threadMessages with fade+scale per message. Reply sent successfully and appeared in thread
animation_verification.inbox_send_button_spinner: PASS (code verified) - Loader2 animate-spin when sending===true. Fast API response makes it unobservable in test
animation_verification.landing_integration_bar: PASS - motion.section with whileInView on integration bar (LandingPage.jsx line 224)
animation_verification.landing_meet_anton: PASS - whileInView stagger animations on Meet Anton section
animation_verification.landing_how_anton_works: PASS - whileInView stagger on How Anton Works cards
animation_verification.smooth_scroll: PASS - index.css html{scroll-behavior:smooth}, #meet-anton anchor href confirmed
animation_verification.sidebar_active_indicator: FAIL - layoutId='nav-active' duplicated (2 motion.divs per active item instead of 1)
animation_verification.all_pages_load: PASS - All 9 pages (dashboard, discovery, campaigns, analytics, payments, inbox, brand-agent, settings) load without errors
animation_verification.no_console_errors: PASS - No React error overlay, no crash-level errors. Console shows 401 on auth/me which is transient on initial load before cookie propagates

seed_data_creation: None (test reply sent to TEST_Influencer thread in inbox)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All animation implementations verified. One bug to fix: duplicate layoutId='nav-active' in Layout.jsx (remove lines 77-83). After fix, navigate between sidebar items and verify smooth spring animation on active indicator. All other animations (countup, health bar, page transitions, kanban hover, inbox messages) are working correctly.
rca_of_issues: Layout.jsx lines 77-83 are an exact copy of lines 71-76. The active indicator motion.div with layoutId='nav-active' was accidentally duplicated. Framer Motion requires unique layoutIds within the same layout group - having 2 elements with the same layoutId causes animation conflicts. Fix: delete lines 77-83 entirely (the second motion.div block inside the {active && (...)} block).
